name: layout/app-shell
description: Full-page application shell with persisted collapsible sidebar. Includes a signal-driven top progress bar with determinate progress, error state, and dismissible error strip.

meta.name: AppShell
meta.description: Full-page application shell with persisted collapsible sidebar. Includes a signal-driven top progress bar with determinate progress, error state, and dismissible error strip.

props.name: persistKey
props.description: localStorage key prefix. Pass false to disable persistence.

props.name: state
props.description: External shell state from createShellState(). Created internally when omitted.

whenToUse: A full-page application frame with header, collapsible sidebar, and content
You need a bare shell to compose your own navigation into
whenNotToUse: You want opinionated, prewired sidebar navigation — use SidebarApp
A simple centered content page — use Section or Center

related.name: SidebarApp
related.reason: Use the opinionated block when you want prewired sidebar nav

related.name: DashboardLayout
related.reason: Use for a stats-strip dashboard page rather than a bare shell

intent.a11yRationale: Provides landmark structure with header and navigation regions for screen reader orientation.
